item.title: Farm Tractor Recovery from a Pond
item.description: A farm tractor recovery from a pond, showing the towing and rescue process used to bring the machine back out. The operation highlights practical recovery work in a field setting. What equipment

media:content.media:title: Farm Tractor Recovery from a Pond
media:content.media:description: A farm tractor recovery from a pond, showing the towing and rescue process used to bring the machine back out. The operation highlights practical recovery work in a field setting. What equipment

item.title: Securing the Landing
item.description: A look at a heavy recovery operation focused on securing the landing and managing the vehicle recovery process. The work highlights the equipment and field techniques used in a real-world towing and

media:content.media:title: Securing the Landing
media:content.media:description: A look at a heavy recovery operation focused on securing the landing and managing the vehicle recovery process. The work highlights the equipment and field techniques used in a real-world towing and

item.title: Specialty Boom Truck Tow
item.description: A complex recovery operation involves towing a specialty boom truck with careful coordination and control. What makes oversized equipment recoveries so challenging?

media:content.media:title: Specialty Boom Truck Tow
media:content.media:description: A complex recovery operation involves towing a specialty boom truck with careful coordination and control. What makes oversized equipment recoveries so challenging?

item.title: Pickup Truck Recovery
item.description: A standard pickup truck recovery shows the step-by-step process of safely retrieving a vehicle from a difficult position. What makes even simple recoveries challenging?

media:content.media:title: Pickup Truck Recovery
media:content.media:description: A standard pickup truck recovery shows the step-by-step process of safely retrieving a vehicle from a difficult position. What makes even simple recoveries challenging?

item.title: Semi Ends Up in the Wrong Spot
item.description: A semi-truck ends up off-course and requires recovery to get it back onto the correct path. How do crews manage large commercial recoveries?

media:content.media:title: Semi Ends Up in the Wrong Spot
media:content.media:description: A semi-truck ends up off-course and requires recovery to get it back onto the correct path. How do crews manage large commercial recoveries?

item.title: Chevy Cavalier Recovery
item.description: A damaged Chevy Cavalier is carefully recovered and repositioned after a serious incident. What does it take to handle small-car recoveries?

media:content.media:title: Chevy Cavalier Recovery
media:content.media:description: A damaged Chevy Cavalier is carefully recovered and repositioned after a serious incident. What does it take to handle small-car recoveries?

item.title: An Upside Down Job
item.description: A flipped or overturned vehicle requires careful recovery techniques to bring it back upright safely. What’s the hardest part of these jobs?

media:content.media:title: An Upside Down Job
media:content.media:description: A flipped or overturned vehicle requires careful recovery techniques to bring it back upright safely. What’s the hardest part of these jobs?

item.title: A Job Takes an Unexpected Turn
item.description: A recovery job changes direction when unforeseen challenges appear on site. How do crews adapt in real time?

media:content.media:title: A Job Takes an Unexpected Turn
media:content.media:description: A recovery job changes direction when unforeseen challenges appear on site. How do crews adapt in real time?

item.title: Something’s Off
item.description: A keen eye notices a potential issue with a truck before it becomes a bigger problem. Why is inspection so important in recovery work?

media:content.media:title: Something’s Off
media:content.media:description: A keen eye notices a potential issue with a truck before it becomes a bigger problem. Why is inspection so important in recovery work?

item.title: Log Truck Flips on a Two-Lane Road
item.description: A serious roadside incident involving a log truck rollover on a two-lane road, with recovery efforts underway. The video focuses on response and cleanup operations. What do you think is the most dangerous type of road recovery?

media:content.media:title: Log Truck Flips on a Two-Lane Road
media:content.media:description: A serious roadside incident involving a log truck rollover on a two-lane road, with recovery efforts underway. The video focuses on response and cleanup operations. What do you think is the most dangerous type of road recovery?

item.title: Life on the Fog Line
item.description: A look into recovery work along dangerous roadside conditions where visibility and safety are constant concerns. What makes fog-line work so risky?

media:content.media:title: Life on the Fog Line
media:content.media:description: A look into recovery work along dangerous roadside conditions where visibility and safety are constant concerns. What makes fog-line work so risky?

item.title: Runaway Call Leads to Code 3 Response
item.description: A high-priority recovery response is triggered after a runaway situation requires urgent attention. How do crews respond to emergency calls like this?

media:content.media:title: Runaway Call Leads to Code 3 Response
media:content.media:description: A high-priority recovery response is triggered after a runaway situation requires urgent attention. How do crews respond to emergency calls like this?
